queue_item.action: Compose trusted-builder, DSSE/transparency, signing-time, and signer-identity decisions into one fail-closed same-subject evidence-promotion gate.

progress.finding: Independent trust decisions must all pass and bind the same artifact digest. Missing, failed, or cross-subject decisions must reject evidence promotion.
progress.verification: Five deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime.
progress.trust_limit: The composer performs no cryptography and does not establish claim truth; it only combines normalized upstream decisions.

queue_item.handoff: Vercel and Cloudflare promotion workflows should normalize all four upstream decisions with the exact evidence artifact SHA-256, then call this composer and publish only when promoted is true.

preservation_rule: Do not overwrite operations/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json, other teams' queue updates, or Git history.
